nasb.text: So he took his people and divided them into three companies, and lay in wait in the field; when he looked and saw the people coming out from the city, he arose against them and slew them.

esv.text: He took his people and divided them into three companies and set an ambush in the fields. And he looked and saw the people coming out of the city. So he rose against them and killed them.

cnv.text: 亞比米勒就把他的人分作三隊，埋伏在田間；他在那裡觀看，見有人從城裡出來，就起來攻擊他們，把他們擊殺了。

ccb.text: 把部下兵分三队，埋伏在田间，等城里的人出来时，伏击他们。
